ar.partner.tech_partner_description: hOUR Timebank is proudly powered by Project NEXUS — an open-source timebanking platform built to help communities exchange skills and strengthen social bonds. Our technology partnership ensures every member benefits from a modern, accessible, and community-first digital experience.

pl.impact_report.activity_note: Data covers the period September 2021 to August 2022. Active exchanges include both one-to-one and group exchanges recorded through the platform.
pl.impact_report.activity_para: During the study period, hOUR Timebank recorded significant activity across its member network, demonstrating sustained engagement and growth.
pl.impact_report.case_study_elaine_quote: I joined after retirement and didn't know what to expect. Within weeks I was teaching computer skills and getting lifts to appointments. It's not charity — it's community.
pl.impact_report.case_study_monica_quote: I was referred by my GP after a really difficult year. The timebank gave me purpose — I started helping with gardening and before I knew it, I had a whole network of friends. It genuinely changed my life.
pl.impact_report.cta_subtitle: Download the complete study with full methodology, data tables, and detailed analysis.
pl.impact_report.demographics_para: The hOUR Timebank serves a diverse membership spanning all adult age groups, with particularly strong engagement from the 45–64 age bracket. The gender split is 62% female, 38% male.
pl.impact_report.discussion_factor_0_descri: Small paid coordination generates large volumes of volunteer exchange, amplifying the social return on each euro of core funding invested.
pl.impact_report.discussion_factor_1_descri: The managed referral pathway provides a structured alternative for GPs and social prescribers, reducing demand on clinical mental health services.
pl.impact_report.discussion_factor_2_descri: The give-and-receive model overcomes the stigma of "needing help" and drives sustained participation compared to traditional volunteering.
pl.impact_report.discussion_factor_3_descri: The online matching platform reduces coordination overhead and enables members to arrange exchanges independently, increasing scalability.
pl.impact_report.discussion_para: The study identifies several factors that contribute to the exceptionally high SROI and the programme's effectiveness as a community development model.
pl.impact_report.hero_description: An independent Social Return on Investment analysis evaluating the social, economic, and community impact of Timebanking Ireland's hOUR Timebank programme.
pl.impact_report.intro_para: This study was commissioned by Timebanking Ireland to evaluate the social impact and return on investment of the hOUR Timebank programme. Conducted by an independent research team, the analysis covers the period 2021–22 and uses the Social Return on Investment (SROI) framework to quantify both economic and social outcomes.
pl.impact_report.lit_review_0_description: Putnam's bridging and bonding capital; how timebanking creates trust networks across demographic boundaries.
pl.impact_report.lit_review_1_description: WHO-5 and WEMWBS measurement tools; evidence for subjective wellbeing improvements through reciprocal exchange.
pl.impact_report.lit_review_2_description: How mutual aid models strengthen community response to health crises, economic disruption, and social isolation.
pl.impact_report.lit_review_3_description: The New Economics Foundation framework for valuing social outcomes using financial proxy indicators.
pl.impact_report.literature_para: The research draws on extensive evidence connecting timebanking to established frameworks in social capital theory, community resilience, and public health outcomes.
pl.impact_report.meta_description: The full 2023 Social Impact Study for hOUR Timebank — independent SROI analysis showing €16 social return for every €1 invested.
pl.impact_report.outcome_connection_text: of members report feeling significantly more socially connected since joining the timebank.
pl.impact_report.outcome_wellbeing_text: of members report improved mental health and personal wellbeing after participation.
pl.impact_report.rec_0: Secure multi-year core funding to ensure programme continuity and reduce annual grant dependency.
pl.impact_report.rec_1: Expand the social prescribing referral pathway in partnership with HSE primary care teams.
pl.impact_report.rec_2: Launch at least 3 new community chapters in underserved areas within 24 months.
pl.impact_report.rec_3: Develop corporate partnership programme targeting CSR-aligned organisations.
pl.impact_report.rec_4: Invest in platform development to support multi-community federation and data reporting.
pl.impact_report.rec_5: Commission a follow-up longitudinal study to track long-term health and wellbeing outcomes.
pl.impact_report.sroi_benchmark_note: This SROI ratio of 16:1 significantly exceeds the benchmark for community development programmes, which typically range from 2:1 to 5:1. The high ratio reflects the leveraged nature of timebanking — modest financial input generates extensive volunteer-driven social activity.
pl.impact_report.sroi_description: For every €1 invested in hOUR Timebank, €16.06 of social value is generated. This figure accounts for deadweight, attribution, and displacement.
pl.impact_report.study_objective_0: Quantify the social and economic value created by the hOUR Timebank
pl.impact_report.study_objective_1: Assess participant wellbeing outcomes using validated measurement tools
pl.impact_report.study_objective_2: Evaluate the cost-effectiveness of the timebanking model for public funding
pl.impact_report.study_objective_3: Document the referral pathway and engagement process
pl.impact_report.study_objective_4: Provide evidence-based recommendations for programme expansion
pl.impact_summary.cta_subtitle: Partner with hOUR Timebank to create measurable community wellbeing. Every contribution delivers 16x social return.
pl.impact_summary.hero_subtitle: An independent Social Return on Investment study confirms that hOUR Timebank generates exceptional social value for communities across Ireland.
pl.impact_summary.impact_report_description: The full independent SROI evaluation covering methodology, outcomes, and financial analysis.
pl.impact_summary.meta_description: Discover how hOUR Timebank creates €16 of social value for every €1 invested. Explore wellbeing outcomes, public health potential, and our strategic vision.
pl.impact_summary.public_health_para1: Timebanking directly addresses social determinants of health — loneliness, social isolation, and lack of community connection — that drive demand for GP visits and mental health services.
pl.impact_summary.public_health_para2: Our managed referral pathway provides a structured, evidence-based alternative for social prescribers looking to connect patients with meaningful community engagement.
pl.impact_summary.public_health_quote: The data shows timebanking is not just a nice-to-have — it's a cost-effective public health intervention.
pl.impact_summary.strategic_docs_subtitle: Explore the evidence and vision behind our work.
pl.impact_summary.strategic_plan_descriptio: Our five-year roadmap for growth, federation, and financial sustainability.
pl.impact_summary.wellbeing_100_text: of members report improved mental health and personal wellbeing after joining the timebank.
pl.impact_summary.wellbeing_95_text: of members feel significantly more socially connected and integrated in their community.
pl.impact_summary.wellbeing_quote: Being part of the timebank gave me a reason to get up in the morning. I went from feeling invisible to feeling needed.
pl.partner.cta_subtitle: Whether you're a corporation, funder, researcher, or community leader — there's a partnership model that works for you.
pl.partner.funding_gap_para1: Community organisations like hOUR Timebank deliver extraordinary social value — but operate on shoestring budgets. Our independent 2023 study shows a 16:1 social return, yet core funding covers only basic operations.
pl.partner.funding_gap_para2: Strategic partnerships can bridge this gap. Whether through corporate CSR programmes, research collaborations, or direct sponsorship, your support directly amplifies community wellbeing and builds social infrastructure that benefits everyone.
pl.partner.hero_subtitle: Join forces with a proven social impact organisation. Every €1 you invest generates €16 of measurable social value for communities across Ireland.
pl.partner.impact_card_0_description: Independent research confirms a 16:1 Social Return on Investment. Your support directly translates into measurable community wellbeing.
pl.partner.impact_card_1_description: Our impact figures come from a rigorous, independent evaluation. We provide full transparency on outcomes, spend, and social metrics.
pl.partner.impact_card_2_description: A 5-year roadmap to scale nationally with federated communities, corporate partnerships, and digital-first engagement.
pl.partner.learn_more_0_description: See our full SROI report and outcomes data
pl.partner.learn_more_1_description: Our 5-year vision for growth and federation
pl.partner.meta_description: Partner with hOUR Timebank to create €16 of social value for every €1 invested. Corporate partnerships, sponsorships, and research opportunities.
pl.partner.partners_banner_alt: Partner logos: West Cork Development Partnership, SICAP, Cork County Council, Department of Housing Planning Community and Local Government, European Structural and Investment Funds, European Social Fund
pl.partner.partnership_opportunities_subtit: Multiple ways to make a meaningful difference.
pl.partner.partnership_type_0_description: Align your CSR goals with tangible social outcomes. Employee volunteering, matched funding, and branded community projects.
pl.partner.partnership_type_1_description: Fund a hub coordinator, sponsor community events, or support our digital platform. Every contribution amplifies social return.
pl.partner.partnership_type_2_description: Collaborate on our open-source platform, provide technical expertise, or support our digital inclusion programmes.
pl.partner.partnership_type_3_description: Access a living lab for social innovation research. Study community resilience, wellbeing metrics, and mutual aid dynamics.
pl.partner.tech_partner_description: hOUR Timebank is proudly powered by Project NEXUS — an open-source timebanking platform built to help communities exchange skills and strengthen social bonds. Our technology partnership ensures every member benefits from a modern, accessible, and community-first digital experience.
pl.partner.why_partner_subtitle: Independent evidence backs every claim we make.
pl.related.heading: Related Pages
pl.social_prescribing.cta_heading: Partner With Us on Social Prescribing
pl.social_prescribing.cta_para1: We welcome conversations with GPs, social prescribers, community health teams, and public sector organisations interested in evidence-based community referral pathways.
pl.social_prescribing.cta_para2: Our model is ready to scale. Let us show you how timebanking can complement your existing services and deliver measurable social outcomes.
pl.social_prescribing.hero_subtitle: A structured, evidence-based pathway connecting patients to community support. Validated outcomes. Measurable impact. Real social return.
pl.social_prescribing.meta_description: A structured, evidence-based social prescribing pathway. 100% improved wellbeing, 95% increased social connection, 16:1 SROI.
pl.social_prescribing.outcome_0_description: Every participant reports improved mental health and personal wellbeing
pl.social_prescribing.outcome_1_description: Participants feel significantly more socially connected after engagement
pl.social_prescribing.outcome_2_description: Independent SROI analysis validates exceptional value for public investment
pl.social_prescribing.referral_pathway_subt: A four-step process designed for healthcare professionals and community link workers.
pl.social_prescribing.referral_step_0_descr: A GP, social prescriber, or community health worker submits a structured referral through our secure pathway. No self-referral barriers — the link worker initiates contact.
pl.social_prescribing.referral_step_1_descr: Our Hub Coordinator personally welcomes the participant, explains how timebanking works, and creates a profile highlighting their strengths and interests.
pl.social_prescribing.referral_step_2_descr: The coordinator matches the participant with suitable exchanges, group activities, or community events — building confidence through meaningful, supported engagement.
pl.social_prescribing.referral_step_3_descr: Regular check-ins track progress against wellbeing indicators. Outcomes data is shared with the referrer, closing the feedback loop and demonstrating impact.
pl.social_prescribing.strategic_fit_0: Aligned with Sláintecare community-based care objectives
pl.social_prescribing.strategic_fit_1: Supports HSE Social Prescribing Framework delivery
pl.social_prescribing.strategic_fit_2: Addresses social isolation and loneliness at community level
pl.social_prescribing.strategic_fit_3: Provides structured outcomes data for public health reporting
pl.social_prescribing.strategic_fit_4: Scalable model through federated community network
pl.social_prescribing.testimonial_quote: The timebank didn't just give me something to do — it gave me somewhere to belong. My GP referred me after a tough year, and now I'm the one helping others.
pl.social_prescribing.validated_outcomes_su: Independent research confirms the effectiveness of our model.
pl.strategic_plan.cta_subtitle: Whether you want to partner, fund, volunteer, or join as a member — there's a role for you in building a more connected Ireland.
pl.strategic_plan.exec_summary_para: This strategic plan sets out a five-year vision for Timebanking Ireland and the hOUR Timebank programme. Building on our proven 16:1 social return, we aim to grow from a single community hub to a federated national network of timebanking communities, while securing financial sustainability through diversified income streams.
pl.strategic_plan.goal_1_text: Expand from 1 to 10+ active community chapters by 2030, reaching 2,500+ members through federation and digital-first engagement.
pl.strategic_plan.goal_2_text: Achieve 40% earned revenue by Year 5 through platform licensing, corporate partnerships, and membership models.
pl.strategic_plan.hero_subtitle: Covering 2026–2030 — approved by the Board of Timebanking Ireland CLG.
pl.strategic_plan.hero_tagline: A five-year roadmap for sustainable growth, federated communities, and lasting social impact.
pl.strategic_plan.meta_description: hOUR Timebank's five-year strategic plan covering growth, federation, financial resilience, and community impact goals for 2026–2030.
pl.strategic_plan.mission_text: To strengthen communities by enabling people to share their time, skills, and support through a trusted timebanking network — building social capital, reducing isolation, and creating measurable wellbeing outcomes.
pl.strategic_plan.risk_0_mitigation: Diversify income streams, build reserves, pursue multi-year grants, and develop earned revenue through platform licensing.
pl.strategic_plan.risk_1_mitigation: Document processes, cross-train volunteers, establish succession plan, invest in coordinator wellbeing support.
pl.strategic_plan.risk_2_mitigation: Start with established community partners, pilot small before scaling, use local champions and peer ambassadors.
pl.strategic_plan.risk_3_mitigation: Open-source infrastructure, negotiate hosting rates, explore technology partnerships with socially-minded tech firms.
pl.strategic_plan.risk_4_mitigation: Recognition programmes, regular appreciation events, manageable time commitments, clear boundaries and expectations.
pl.strategic_plan.swot_opportunities_0: Sláintecare and HSE social prescribing expansion
pl.strategic_plan.swot_opportunities_1: Growing corporate CSR demand for impact metrics
pl.strategic_plan.swot_opportunities_2: Federation model enables rapid community scaling
pl.strategic_plan.swot_opportunities_3: Open-source platform licensing for earned revenue
pl.strategic_plan.swot_strengths_1: Dedicated coordinator and engaged member base
pl.strategic_plan.swot_strengths_3: Strong alignment with national health policy
pl.strategic_plan.swot_threats_0: Core funding not renewed or reduced
pl.strategic_plan.swot_threats_4: Slow adoption in new geographic areas
pl.strategic_plan.swot_weaknesses_3: No formal board governance structure yet
pl.strategic_plan.swot_weaknesses_4: Digital literacy barriers for some members
pl.strategic_plan.vision_text: A connected Ireland where every community has access to a thriving timebanking network, and where everyone's time is valued equally.
pl.timebanking_guide.cta_subtitle: Join a growing community of people who believe everyone's time is equally valuable. It's free, it's simple, and it changes lives.
pl.timebanking_guide.hero_subtitle: Give an hour. Earn a credit. Get the help you need. Timebanking is a simple, powerful way to build community through mutual support.
pl.timebanking_guide.how_it_works_subtitle: Timebanking is beautifully simple. No money changes hands — just time, skill, and goodwill.
pl.timebanking_guide.meta_description: Learn how timebanking works — give an hour, earn a credit, get help. Join a community built on reciprocity and trust.
pl.timebanking_guide.proven_impact_subtitle: Independent research confirms the transformative power of timebanking.
pl.timebanking_guide.stat_100_description: Members report feeling better connected and supported
pl.timebanking_guide.stat_161_description: For every €1 invested, €16 of social value is created
pl.timebanking_guide.stat_95_description: Members feel more integrated in their community
pl.timebanking_guide.step_0_description: Share a skill you love — from practical help to a friendly chat or a lift to the shops.
pl.timebanking_guide.step_1_description: You automatically earn one Time Credit for every hour you spend helping another member.
pl.timebanking_guide.step_2_description: Spend your credit to get support, learn a new skill, or join a community work day.
pl.timebanking_guide.value_0_description: Everyone has something valuable to offer. Timebanking recognises the unique contributions of every member, regardless of background or circumstance.
pl.timebanking_guide.value_1_description: Raising children, caring for elders, volunteering, and community building — timebanking values the essential work that keeps communities strong.
pl.timebanking_guide.value_2_description: Giving and receiving go hand in hand. When you help someone, you create a ripple of goodwill that comes back to strengthen the whole community.
pl.timebanking_guide.value_3_description: Timebanking weaves a web of trust and mutual support. Every exchange builds social capital and creates lasting connections between neighbours.
pl.timebanking_guide.values_subtitle: Timebanking is built on four core values that guide everything we do.
